Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Don't just stand there! If you're in here, you gotta dance![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Dancing is a great stress reliever! Everything bad just melts away![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}I'm a Gekkoukan student, and... Remember those rumors that were going around the other day?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}I hate hearing rumors like that. How about you?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Oh, really? I'm jealous...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Yeah, I can't stand hearing those conversations...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}But when I'm here, it's all okay. I don't have to worry about a thing.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}I wouldn't mind going out with a guy who walks around topless...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}As long as he's tanned and toned, like a surfer![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}That guy I saw earlier... He was just freaky.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Long, greasy hair, pale skin, no meat or muscle, and parading around half-naked.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}He was sooo creepy and gross...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}It hasn't thrown off my groove yet, but I'm getting kind of scared...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}You see that man there? He's so... weird.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}I knew he was weird from the start, but wow! He's really out there.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Watch, I bet he'll get kicked out pretty soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}I couldn't hook up with any boys this summer. This sucks...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Did you get a girlfriend?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}So you're going to leave me here, huh?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Oh well. I'll wish you good luck as I dance![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Ooh, a pair of loners! Wanna shake your ass here with me tonight?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Do you worry about your exam scores?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Just dance and you'll be fine! Like me![n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}So what if your scores are low? You won't die! Don't worry about it![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Great! That's how it's supposed to be![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}All those new couples at school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}They make fun of me for being single.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}The only thing to do is dance like there's no tomorrow! It's groovy being single![n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}I'm not one of those people who likes spending Christmas by myself...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}But it's worse to rush and try to hook up just for the holidays.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}I'd rather dance than waste my time like that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}Isn't this town weird? It's all dirty and messy.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}I'm really sensitive to it... I can't concentrate anymore.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}It's messing up my rhythm.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}I'm not joining any cult. Those people annoy the hell out of me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}If I have to convert to some religion, give me one where I can sing and dance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 5 21 1 408}It'd probably be healthier, too.[n]{f 1 1}
